title: LVB Rustic Bookcase and BookShelf, Metal Wood 6 Tier Book Shelf, Industrial Vertical Display Etagere Book Case 6 Shelf, Vintage Large Book Shelves for Bedroom Living Room, Brown, 180 CM
features: 【Chic Industrial-Style Bookshelf】 Elevate your home office with this rustic big bookshelf. Its delicate middle hollow design, rustic brown wood grain, and matte black metal frame create an industrial-inspired style that complements your home decor beautifully.

【Ample Storage】Our 6-tier bookshelf boasts six long shelves, offering abundant space for books, magazines, potted plants, and more. The top shelf serves as an excellent surface for displaying your cherished ornaments.

Stability and Strength】Crafted of heavy duty metal frames, wall anchor kit, X-shaped bracket on the back, the simple tall etagere bookcase boasts robust sturdiness and increase the total weight capacity up to 385 kg. Meanwhile, Adjustable levelers in the bottom prevent wobbling and scratching from uneven floor.

【Multifunctional and Versatile Bookshelf】Seamlessly blending utility and personality, this wide wooden bookcase is not only perfect to showcase your favorite literature, collectibles, CDs, photos, collected curios, but is also versatile for placing in the hall, bedroom, living room and office with its rustic industrial finish.

【Worry-Free Assembly and 100% Satisfaction Service】Based on excellent quality, we can provide 24-Hour Friendly Customer Service, 30-Day Free Return, 24-Month Quality Assurance and Lifetime Professional Customer Service for this large vintage bookshelf.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Rustic Brown Rustic Brown bookshelf : open shelf with timeless design, stylish for any living room – combining elegance and functionality . Adjustable Legs for Bookcase With the adjustable screw feet, the bookshelf remains stable even on uneven floors, protects against scratches and prevents slipping . Thick Shelves The open shelf with 3 cm thick shelves is sturdy and durable . As a living room shelf, it remains stable even under heavy loads. Wall Anti-tip Kit Wall anti-tip kit secures tall modern bookshelf, preventing tipping accidents while ensuring stable vertical mounting . Maximum Stability with X-Shaped Back Support LVB Rustic Brown wooden book shelf features an X-shaped back support for optimal stability , preventing shelf deformation even under full load. This sturdy construction guarantees lasting durability, making the bookshelf an ideal furniture piece for living rooms or offices to safely display and store books and decor. Versatile Storage Design Bookcase / Office Bookcase / Display Shelf / Storage Shelf The book shelf is a versatile shelving unit and practical freestanding shelf for your home. With six tiers ( 30D x 120W x 180H cm ). The bookcases free standing provides ample space for books, plants and decorations. The 3 cm thick shelves are durable and hard-wearing. Perfect as living room furniture , it blends stylishly into any space.
